The First Omen (2024)

Theatrical Performance
Domestic Box Office $20,092,802Details
International Box Office $33,900,000
Worldwide Box Office $53,992,802
Domestic Physical Disc Sales
DVD Sales (estimated) $359,466
Blu-ray Sales (estimated) $351,016
Total $710,482
Further financial details...

Synopsis

A woman starts to question her own faith when she uncovers a terrifying conspiracy to bring about the birth of evil incarnate in Rome.

Metrics

Opening Weekend:$8,353,710 (41.6% of total gross)
Legs:2.41 (domestic box office/biggest weekend)
Domestic Share:37.2% (domestic box office/worldwide)
Production Budget:$30,000,000 (worldwide box office is 1.8 times production budget)
Theater counts:3,375 opening theaters/3,375 max. theaters, 3.3 weeks average run per theater
Infl. Adj. Dom. BO $21,247,562

Movie Details

Domestic Releases: April 5th, 2024 (Wide) by 20th Century Studios
International Releases: April 3rd, 2024 (Wide), released as The First Omen (天魔：惡之初) (Taiwan)
April 3rd, 2024 (Wide) (Indonesia)
April 3rd, 2024 (Wide), released as The First Omen (오멘-저주의 시작) (South Korea)
April 4th, 2024 (Wide) (Brazil)
April 4th, 2024 (Wide) (Croatia)
Video Release: May 28th, 2024 by 20th Century Studios
MPA Rating: R for violent content, grisly/disturbing images, and brief graphic nudity.
(Rating bulletin 2821 (cert #54831), 2/14/2024)
Running Time: 119 minutes
Franchise: The Omen
Cast, crew, or production detail: Prequel
Filming location (country): Italy
Geographical setting: Rome, Italy
Plot point: Monks and Nuns, Religious Extremism
Social setting: Supernatural
Subgenre: Supernatural Horror
Source:Original Screenplay
Genre:Horror
Production Method:Live Action
Creative Type:Contemporary Fiction
Production/Financing Companies: Phantom Four, 20th Century Studios
Production Countries: United States
Languages: English
